none.justification: Answer A correctly identifies the 14 whole functions in src/ap/ieee802_11.c and all 9 partial functions, but it explicitly excludes the Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c functions that GT says must count. This misses 35 whole functions, giving 23/58 total despite otherwise matching the in-file #ifdef cases.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B matches the GT exactly: 49 whole functions (35 Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c plus 14 in src/ap/ieee802_11.c), 9 partial functions, 58 total, and excludes out-of-scope sibling-tree files. Its listed function names and file distribution align with the verified rubric.

lsp.justification: Answer C matches the GT exactly: it includes the 35 src/common/sae.c Makefile-gated whole functions, the 14 ieee802_11.c whole functions, and the same 9 partial functions across the expected 8 src/ files. The minor parenthetical uncertainty around rsn_key_mgmt_to_bitfield does not change the correctly listed function/count.
